biography: Mikko, a familiar face from Kurk Golf, brings a certain calm and methodical approach to the greens. While he might not be the flashiest player, his steady demeanor often unsettles his opponents.

Having previously participated in the Hector Trophée, Mikko is known for his strategic play and calculated risks. Although the Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Mikko's determination is unwavering. He approaches each tournament as a learning opportunity, meticulously studying the course and his opponents.

While Mikko will not be participating in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his presence will surely be missed. However, as we know, anything can happen, and last-minute changes to the field are always a possibility.
